name: logoscope-frontend
description: Logoscope Frontend - 智能日志分析平台

scripts.test:agent-runtime: rm -rf .tmp-tests && tsc --pretty false --module ESNext --moduleResolution bundler --target ES2020 --noEmit false --rootDir src --outDir .tmp-tests src/utils/aiAgentRuntime.ts src/utils/aiAgentRuntimeReducer.ts src/utils/aiRuntimeThread.ts src/utils/aiRuntimeStream.ts src/features/ai-runtime/utils/runtimeTranscript.ts src/features/ai-runtime/utils/runtimeView.ts src/features/ai-runtime/utils/runtimeEventProjection.ts src/features/ai-runtime/utils/runtimePresentation.ts && node --experimental-specifier-resolution=node --test scripts/aiAgentRuntime.test.mjs && rm -rf .tmp-tests
scripts.test:command-match: rm -rf .tmp-tests && tsc --pretty false --module ESNext --moduleResolution bundler --target ES2020 --noEmit false --rootDir src/utils --outDir .tmp-tests src/utils/followUpCommandMatch.ts && node --test scripts/followUpCommandMatch.test.mjs && rm -rf .tmp-tests
